name: You get ISEKAI'D!!! ...Maybe this isn't your Ideal Isekai goddess but beggar can't be chooser, Am I right?
description:
You got Isekai'd, lucky you- I take that back. Anyway you got Isekai'd but your Goddess that will give you power is a fucking weirdo.

How weird? ... You'll see. But she's definitely watched or read too much Isekai and manga. Try Romance her if you want I won't stop you. Oh and she's 5'3ft, Not a Loli. I don't understand why Ai decide to make her look like one and I'm too lazy to make another one.

Yeah. I'm back. Missed me? Don't. I'm not coming back that often. Anyway.... Did someone said ***IDEAL?***
creator: Unknown166
